name: Invincible
flavor: 'The famous steed of Arthas Menethil, who serves its master in life and in death. Riding him is truly a feat of strength.'
notes: This mount has a drop chance of .01%.

name: Headless Horseman's Mount
flavor: 'Be it into the flood, or into the fire, this one will go where you require.'
notes: This mount has a drop chance of .01% and is only available during the Hallow's End.

name: Azure Drake
flavor: 'Always speak politely to an enraged dragon.'
notes: Can drop simultaneously with the Blue Drake.

name: Blue Drake
flavor: 'Come not between the dragon and his wrath.'
notes: Can drop simultaneously with the Azure Drake.

name: Spectral Tiger
flavor: 'Historians claim that these incorporeal beasts were created when Draenor exploded, unleashing energies that warped the world's flora and fauna.'
notes: Only obtainable with a wow tcg card code, which are no longer in production.

name: Emerald Raptor
flavor: 'Bred from the fiercest stock anywhere and guaranteed not to bite (much).'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darkspear Trolls (or playing as a troll). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Striped Frostsaber
flavor: 'This hearty mount's ferocious appetite earned it the nickname 'Dragon Belly' in the night elf language.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Striped Nightsaber
flavor: 'Considered one of Azeroth's perfect predators, these agile beasts can sprint through dense forests without making a sound.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Spotted Frostsaber
flavor: 'This hearty mount's ferocious appetite earned it the nickname 'Dragon Belly' in the night elf language.'

name: Striped Dawnsaber

name: Swift Stormsaber
flavor: 'Rumor has it that this breed was named after the renowned archdruid Malfurion Stormrage.'

name: Swift Frostsaber
flavor: 'Night elves raise frostsaber cubs from infancy, forging lifelong bonds of trust between rider and beast.'

name: Swift Mistsaber
flavor: 'Some historians claim that this breed's misty grey coat is the result of ancient Highborne experiments conducted on nightsabers.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 10 gold.

name: Cenarion War Hippogryph
flavor: 'Members of the Cenarion Circle have shared a long and prosperous partnership with their hippogryph allies. When conflict is unavoidable, the Cenarion War Hippogryph is called into service.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Cenarion Expedition. Bought with 2000 gold.

name: Red Riding Nether Ray
flavor: 'Nether Rays are among the most trusted, versatile mounts in all of Outland and beyond.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Sha'tari Skyguard. Bought with 200 gold.

name: Red Drake
flavor: 'You should never listen to minstrels' fancies. A dragon would never hurt a soul, unless they tried to hurt him first'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Wyrmrest Accord. Bought with 2000 gold.

name: Ice Mammoth
flavor: 'Many ice giants claim that they have trained their favored white mammoths to trigger avalanches with their trumpeting calls.'
notes: Requires Revered with the Sons of Hodir. Bought with 1000 gold.

name: Grand Ice Mammoth
flavor: 'Due to high winds and avalanches, the Sons of Hodir recommend bringing at least two companions if venturing into the dangerous Storm Peaks.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Sons of Hodir. Bought with 10000 gold.

name: Goblin Trike
flavor: 'A compilation of nuts, bolts, gears, and treated wood paneling make for an unusually smooth ride.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Bilgewater Cartel (or playing as a goblin). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Goblin Turbo-Trike
flavor: 'The turbo trike's tri-wheel design adds superior stability and a smaller turn radius over its two wheeled cousins.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Bilgewater Cartel (or playing as a goblin). Bought with 10 gold.

name: Mountain Horse
flavor: 'Images of this breed are often found on kegs of watered-down dwarven brew.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Gilneas (or playing as a worgen). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Swift Mountain Horse
flavor: 'Longs for the day it may return to its home in Gilneas.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Gilneas (or playing as a worgen). Bought with 10 gold.

name: Brown Riding Camel
flavor: Fennimore Quigley is credited with milking the first camel and breaking the record for 'longest unintentional flight,' all in the same afternoon.
notes: Requires Exalted with Ramkahen. Bought with 100 gold.

name: Tan Riding Camel
flavor: 'Fennimore Quigley is credited with milking the first camel and breaking the record for 'longest unintentional flight,' all in the same afternoon.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Ramkahen. Bought with 100 gold.

name: Spectral Steed
flavor: 'Dark spirits flee before the radiance of its presence.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Baradin's Wardens. Bought with 165 Tol Barad Commendation.

name: Spectral Wolf
flavor: 'Fears only fire.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Hellscream's Reach. Bought with 165 Tol Barad Commendation.

name: Drake of the West Wind
flavor: 'Harnessing the elemental powers of the storm, these majestic beasts crackle like lightning and roar like thunder.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Baradin's Wardens or Hellscream's Reach. Bought with 200 Tol Barad Commendation.

notes: Requires Exalted with the Shado-Pan. Bought with 1500 gold.

name: Red Shado-Pan Riding Tiger
flavor: 'When waking a tiger, use a long stick. Better yet, tell your friend to wake the tiger instead.' -Pandaren Proverb
notes: Requires Exalted with the Shado-Pan. Bought with 2500 gold.

name: Golden Cloud Serpent
flavor: 'Golden Cloud Serpents are a treasure to be enjoyed by all who visit the continent of Pandaria.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of the Cloud Serpent. Bought with 3000 gold, or get the first one free after hitting Exalted.

name: Jade Cloud Serpent
flavor: 'Jade Cloud Serpents are light and agile; quick and deadly.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of the Cloud Serpent. Bought with 3000 gold, or get the first one free after hitting Exalted.

name: Azure Cloud Serpent
flavor: 'Azure Cloud Serpents are believed by the Pandaren to be harbingers of good fortune.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of the Cloud Serpent. Bought with 3000 gold, or get the first one free after hitting Exalted.

name: Brown Riding Goat
flavor: 'It takes unflagging patience and a gentle touch to train obstinate mountain goats for riding.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Tillers. Bought with 500 Gold.

name: Black Riding Goat
flavor: 'It takes unflagging patience and a gentle touch to train obstinate mountain goats for riding.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Tillers. Bought with 1500 Gold.

name: White Riding Goat
flavor: 'It takes unflagging patience and a gentle touch to train obstinate mountain goats for riding.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Tillers. Bought with 3250 Gold.

name: Amber Scorpion
flavor: 'The Klaxxi ride massive scorpions into battle against their enemies. A carapace hardened by amber provides superior protection while on the battlefield.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Klaxxi. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Azure Water Strider
flavor: 'Normally bugs are for bait, but how could you look into its eyes and even think that?' -Nat Pagle
notes: Requires Exalted with The Anglers. Bought with 5000 gold.

name: Thundering August Cloud Serpent
dropped_from: Vendor: Sage Whiteheart or Sage Lotusbloom
flavor: 'From their infancy, Thundering Cloud Serpents are drawn to storms. They have been known to chase lightning through the blackened, roiling clouds, and to bathe in the pouring rain.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The August Celestials. Bought with 10000.

name: Red Flying Cloud
flavor: 'An ancient mogu artifact awarded to those who are deeply committed to the discovery and sharing of Pandaren lore'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Lorewalkers. Bought with 600 gold.

name: Grand Armored Wyvern
flavor: 'This ferocious beast, renowned among wyvern handlers, was one of the first mounts chosen to take part in the Horde's Dominance Offensive.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Dominance Offensive. Bought with 2000 gold.

name: Crimson Primal Direhorn
flavor: 'Leave it to the blood elves to pick the red one.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Sunreaver Onslaught. Bought with 3000 gold.

name: Grand Armored Gryphon
flavor: 'This noble gryphon is as staunch a battle companion as any member of the Alliance could ask for.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Operation: Shieldwall. Bought with 2000 gold.

name: Golden Primal Direhorn
flavor: 'Sharp at both ends and crafty in the middle. Leave it to the trolls to think this was a good idea.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Kirin Tor Offensive. Bought with 3000 gold.

name: Heavenly Golden Cloud Serpent
flavor: 'Warmth and hope emanate from this great creature, which glows like a sunrise over the mountains.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Emperor Shaohao. Bought with 100k Timeless Coin.

name: Swift Frostwolf
flavor: 'Amidst the cold heights of Frostfire, the frostwolves hunt anything they can catch. The fastest among them eat well.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Frostwolf Orcs. Bought with 5000 gold and 5000 apexis crystal.

name: Dusty Rockhide
flavor: 'Ever since acquiring this mount, you have been plagued by strange fever dreams of hippety-hoppety clippety-cloppety elekk on parade.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Council of Exarchs. Bought with 5000 gold and 5000 apexis crystal.

name: Shadowmane Charger
dropped_from: Vendor: Ravenspeaker Skeega or Shadow-Sage Brakoss
flavor: 'Draenei poets have likened this talbuk's coloring to shadows cast by moonlight in an ashen forest.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Arakkoa Outcasts. Bought with 5000 gold and 5000 apexis crystals.

name: Domesticated Razorback
dropped_from: Vendor: Gazrix Gearlock or Mimi Wizzlebub
flavor: 'Domesticated' does not mean 'friendly.' Bring some treats.
notes: Requires Exalted with the Steamwheedle 'Preservation' Society. Bought with 5000 gold and 5000 apexis crystals.

name: Deathtusk Felboar
dropped_from: Vendor: Shadow Hunter Denjai or Vindicator Krethos
flavor: 'Veterans of the battle for Outland's Hellfire Peninsula are traumatized by thoughts of these beasts to this day.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Vol'jin's Headhunters or the Hand of the Prophet. Bought with 2375 gold.

name: Corrupted Dreadwing
flavor: 'Bathed in the blood of demons, these corrupted Dread Ravens are significantly more aggressive, and will often kill one another if kept in confinement.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of the Awakened. Bought with 150k apexis crystals.

name: Wild Goretusk
flavor: 'If you want a gentle ride, go find a 'tame happytusk' or something.'
notes: Requires Honored with The Saberstalkers. Bought with 1000 blackfang claws.

name: Bristling Hellboar
flavor: 'The one and only source for the rare culinary ingredient: cursed bacon.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Saberstalkers. Bought with 5000 blackfang claws.

name: Ivory Hawkstrider
flavor: 'My winged children fill the skies. Not this one though.' -Aviana
notes: Requires Exalted with Talon's Vengeance. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Beryl Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Cerulean Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Umber Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Russet Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Amethyst Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Sable Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Lightforged Warframe
flavor: 'The Army of the Light conducts quick, brutal hit-and-run attacks using these agile war machines.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Army of the Light. Bought with 500k gold.

name: Cloudwing Hippogryph
flavor: 'Moreso than normal hippogryphs, the cloudwings of Azsuna prefer to nest high up in mountain caves far above the cloud line.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Court of Farondis. Paragon reward with a 3% chance to drop.

name: Highmountain Elderhorn
flavor: 'The favored mount of Highmountain hunters, they can easily leap across the rushing rivers of Pinerock Basin even when saddled with a full-sized Tauren.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Highmountain Tribe. Paragon reward with a 7% chance to drop.

name: Leywoven Flying Carpet
flavor: 'The threads are so thin and well-stitched, you can't imagine it wasn't made by magic, strand by strand.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Nightfallen. Paragon reward with a 3% chance to drop.

name: Valarjar Stormwing
flavor: 'The beating of its wings sound like the rolling of thunder in the distance.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Valarjar. Paragon reward with a 5% chance to drop.

name: Wild Dreamrunner
flavor: 'Dreamrunners flit between this world and the Emerald Dream at will, reveling in their wild nature.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Dreamweavers. Paragon reward with a 12% chance to drop.

name: Avenging Felcrusher
flavor: 'After Alleria and Turalyon explained the usefulness of the Draenei's long-time companion animal, the Army of the Light brought several into the fold for training.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Army of the Light. Paragon reward with a 4% chance to drop.

name: Blessed Felcrusher
flavor: 'After Alleria and Turalyon explained the usefulness of the Draenei's long-time companion animal, the Army of the Light brought several into the fold for training.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Army of the Light. Paragon reward with a 4% chance to drop.

name: Glorious Felcrusher
flavor: 'After Alleria and Turalyon explained the usefulness of the Draenei's long-time companion animal, the Army of the Light brought several into the fold for training.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Army of the Light. Paragon reward with a 4% chance to drop.
